subject: Fwd: Francis Annius
body:
Maren and Lance want to terminate his employment.  OK?  Do you  want to give 
him any severence?  He was hired 8/7/06 and his current pay  rate is $11.33 
per hour.
 
 
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: "Maren Calloway" <maren524@gmail.com>
Subject: Francis Annius
Date: Mon, 17 Sep 2007 14:22:09 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

Darren,

Lance asked me to send you over info and write-ups on  Francis Annius.

Hire date:  8/7/06, his rate is $11.33 per hour.

Recently we have moved him over to maintenance of the woodshop, etc rather
than strictly cleaning boats to see if he would excel better in a different
position.

He also used to stay an extra half hour each day and wash down the boats at
the Red Hook dock after returning at 4:00.  We have recently taken away this
responsibility since on numerous occasions Carlos came back to check on him
and he had already left, boats uncleaned, although he was being paid for
that time.


-- 
Maren Calloway
LSJ, LLC
6100 Red Hook Quarters, B-3
St. Thomas, USVI 00802
T: 340-775-8100  F:340-775-8108

Darren,
